name: zerodha-clone-root
description: Root configurations to start backend, dashboard, and frontend servers concurrently.

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix dashboard && npm run build --prefix dashboard
scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix dashboard" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
